tasks.build: deno task lume && deno task postbuild && deno bundle --platform=browser --minify --config=deno.json scripts/browser/exceptionless-client.ts -o _site/assets/js/exceptionless-client.js
tasks.serve: deno task build && deno run --allow-read=_site --allow-net=localhost,127.0.0.1 --allow-env=PORT scripts/serve.ts
tasks.check: deno check _config.ts scripts/browser/exceptionless-client.ts scripts/site-collections.ts scripts/postbuild.ts scripts/serve.ts scripts/verify-links.ts scripts/find-unused.ts
tasks.verify: deno task build && deno run --allow-read scripts/verify-links.ts
tasks.unused: deno task build && deno run --allow-read scripts/find-unused.ts
